description: Add dedicated FX1 (Chorus) and FX2 (Reverb) strips between part 16 and EX. Each has ON/OFF, Type dropdown, Output routing, Level fader, and type-specific parameter knobs shown in the EQ expanded area. Rename per-part send knobs from CHO/REV to FX1/FX2.
title: Add FX1/FX2 mixer strips with type-aware parameters
